16 x 16 / Itself = Balance of Maximum Wave Crest Social Harmony Civilization Kingship Sovereignty[0.9375 Ratio of Harmony; 15_16 = 0.9375 Ratio of Harmony](0.9375 R.o.H.)

1 x 16 = 16
16 x 16 = 256
256 x 16 = 4,096
4,096 x 16 = 65,536
65,536 x 16 = 1,048,576
1,048,576 x 16 = 16,777,216
16,777,216 x 16 = 268,435,456
268,435,456 x 16 = 4,294,967,296
4,294,967,296 x 16 = 68,719,476,736
